title: orchis × romanallens
intro: Orchis × romanallens, also known as the Roman Allens Orchid or Roman's Orchid, is a hybrid orchid species created by crossing the Orchis italica and Orchis simia plants. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antitumor compounds. The health benefits of Orchis × romanallens are thought to include reducing inflammation and relieving respiratory issues, as well as exhibiting potential antiviral and antibacterial properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to treat various health conditions, but its effectiveness and safety require further research.
